_comment: Read by scripts/download_weights.py at runtime (in predict.py setup()), not at image build time. Filenames in 'dest' MUST match what the workflow references — workflow_patch.py only patches inputs, not file paths. Pin commit_sha for reproducibility before production (replace /resolve/main/ with /resolve/<sha>/ in the URL). 'auth' field controls credential handling: omit/null = anonymous HF, 'civitai' = requires CIVITAI_TOKEN env var (sent as Bearer header).

weights._comment: Goes in clip/ (not text_encoders/) because CLIPLoaderGGUF scans clip/ for GGUF text encoders. Validated 2026-04-29.
weights.name: Qwen3-4B text encoder (GGUF UD-Q5_K_XL)

weights._comment: Source: vae/diffusion_pytorch_model.safetensors in Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo. Renamed-on-download to z_image_turbo_vae.safetensors to match what the workflow's VAELoader nodes reference. Validated 2026-04-29.
weights.name: Z-Image VAE

weights._comment: Source URL discovered in ComfyUI-Easy-Sam3 README (yolain/sam3-safetensors). Goes in models/sam3/ — that's where easy sam3ModelLoader scans. Validated 2026-04-29.
weights.name: SAM3 fp16

weights._comment: Civitai-gated (model 2253986). Requires CIVITAI_TOKEN env var in the running container; deploy.py forwards it from local .env. Token sent as Authorization: Bearer header (not query string) to keep it out of redirect chains, server logs, and pget output. Replaceable: any other ZImageTurbo character LoRA can be swapped in by changing url + dest filename, then re-running the workflow against the new lora_1 name.
weights.name: d4ra character LoRA (Z-Image Turbo)

weights._comment: DEFERRED: workflows/headswap.json bypasses JoyCaption entirely. The 1038lab/ComfyUI-JoyCaption node has a transformers-version bug — image.resize() receives a SizeDict instead of an (w,h) int tuple, raising TypeError. Re-enable by either pinning the custom node to a known-good revision or patching the resize call. The MULTI_FILE_BUNDLE sentinel makes scripts/download_weights.py skip this entry.
weights.name: JoyCaption (joycaption-beta-one) — DEFERRED
